headline: Jaap Stam says Man Utd need ‘extraordinary’ star to win title
snippet: Bruno Fernandes is an ‘extraordinary’ presence at Manchester United, says Jaap Stam (Picture: Getty) Jaap Stam says Manchester United must do everything in their power to keep Bruno Fernandes at the c
full_text: Bruno Fernandes is an ‘extraordinary’ presence at Manchester United, says Jaap Stam (Picture: Getty) Jaap Stam says Manchester United must do everything in their power to keep Bruno Fernandes at the club so they can ‘make the next step’ and win the Premier League title. Fernandes has been nothing short of a revelation since joining United from Sporting for an initial fee of around £47million back in 2020. Hailed by many as United’s greatest signing in the post-Sir Alex Ferguson era, the 31-year-old has racked up 105 goals and 103 appearances in 319 appearances for the club. Fernandes’ extraordinary contribution has seen the attacking midfielder clinch the Sir Matt Busby Player of the Year award on four occasions – putting him level with Cristiano Ronaldo for the most wins in history. The Portugal international appears a shoo-in to claim the prize for a record-breaking fifth time this season, with only Erling Haaland (29) bettering his goal contribution tally (23) in the Premier League....
